meaning: n.<英>(收治囚犯的)布罗德莫精神病院
examples: Why couldn't Broadmoor adopt some of his ideas?
I've grown up wandering the wards of Broadmoor.
There probably wasn't much to do in Broadmoor but eat.
Opening May 1, 2014 is a second complement to The Broadmoor Wilderness Experience called Cloud Camp.
They are packaged with accommodations at the 5-Star Broadmoor and include ample breakfast and lunch daily.
